prediction_ref.short_label: 1M context as default open-weight era arrives by Q3 2026; vector DBs forced to redefine as long-context cache layers

validation_rows.evidence_summary: Ang DeepSeek V4 Pro/Flash ay nag-carry-forward papasok sa May 1 na may 1M-context Hybrid-Attention na nagbabawas ng compute sa ~10% ng V3.2 sa 1M-context, ang unang DeepSeek release na na-optimize para sa Huawei Ascend. Ang Apr 30 retirement ng Anthropic ng Sonnet 4.5/4 1M-context beta ay pumipilit sa mga customer papunta sa Sonnet 4.6 / Opus 4.6 na may 1M bilang standard pricing. Ang PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) ay nagpapakita ng shared asymmetric KV-pool compression para sa multi-agent inference na nagbawas ng Llama-3-8B 15-agent KV memory mula 19.8GB hanggang 0.45GB.

Ang 97.7% KV-cache cut ng PolyKV sa shared multi-agent inference ay eksaktong long-context-cache replacement architecture na ipina-project ng prediction. Strong reinforcing signal sa magkabilang leg.
bridge.remaining_gap: Isang open-weight Mistral / Meta / Gemma 20-30B Dense release na may native 1M context na explicit na nag-retire ng bundled vector-DB recommendation nito pabor sa long-context dump-and-prune.

Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 named-techniques wave (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) ay nagka-carry. arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL Representation for Agent Skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint ay nagbibigay ng academic scaffolding. Walang sariwang marketplace-signing-gate ship ngayon.

reference_links.label: CSA - CSAI Foundation Announces Key Milestones
MITRE - Updates April 2026
OpenAI - The next evolution of the Agents SDK

bridge.narrative: Ang MITRE-CNA authorization ng CSAI ay ang pinaka-malinis na posibleng institutional precursor sa ATT&CK-extension / AI-RMF-appendix thesis ng prediction, na may named-techniques wave ng ATT&CK v19 na nagpu-populate na ng technique slots. Ang forecast at evidence ng kahapon ay functionally one-day apart at nagko-converge. Ang marketplace-signing-gate kalahati ay nananatiling bukas na leg.
bridge.remaining_gap: Isang Anthropic skills repo / ClawHub / Hugging Face / Multica announcement na nagpapatupad ng signed + provenance-attested publishing bilang publish-blocking gate.

prediction_ref.short_label: H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem exposes unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative; Foundry Local ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers

validation_rows.evidence_summary: TurboQuant (Google Research) standing reference; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite sa 93–105% bf16 throughput; SGLang #21419 in-tree; vLLM v0.19.0 carry; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread aktibo; Microsoft Foundry Local GA (Apr 9) carry-forward bilang nawawalang Windows-default integration point; Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Toolkit for VS Code GA + Foundry Toolbox preview + Observability sa Foundry Control Plane GA ay nagla-layer ng catalog substrate.

reference_links.label: Google Research - TurboQuant
Microsoft - What is Foundry Local?
GitHub Issue - SGLang #23134 TurboQuant fused Triton kernels

bridge.narrative: Ang Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Toolkit GA + Foundry Toolbox preview + Observability sa Foundry Control Plane GA ay nagpapatindi ng Windows-default integration substrate na pinanindigan ng TurboQuant-tied-to-WinML thesis ng prediction, habang ang fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite ng SGLang #23134 + #21419 ay nagdadala ng cross-stack adoption pattern. Strong reinforcing signal.
bridge.remaining_gap: Isang Foundry Catalog entry na explicit na nag-su-surface ng TurboQuant na nakatali sa WinML execution providers, plus matching TGI / Ollama / TensorRT-LLM stable-release flags.

prediction_ref.short_label: Apr 28 WSJ + Apr 29 Mag 7 collision triggers SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite by Q3 2026 — one foundation lab ships audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure; one Big-3 hyperscaler separates per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes

validation_rows.evidence_summary: Ang AAPL Q2 prints ay nagsasara sa Mag 7 super-week na may revenue $111.2B (+17%) / record Services $30.98B (+16%) ngunit walang separate AI-services line; +$100B buyback + 4% dividend hike. Ang Apr 30 Big Tech 2026 AI capex ay nagta-track sa $700B; Q1 capex >$130B. Cerebras IPO mid-May sa $22-25B na may 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI concentration. Mananatili si Powell sa Board hanggang 2028 na nagpapataas ng political-risk premium sa AI-capex tape.

bridge.narrative: Ang pag-close ng Apple sa Mag 7 super-week nang walang separate AI-services line sa record Services revenue plus ang $700B 2026 capex print plus ang Powell's Board-stay na nagpapataas ng political-risk premium ay magkakasamang bumubuo ng disclosure-pressure backdrop na ipina-project ng prediction. Ang audited monthly-revenue / WAU at per-token-margin 10-Q footnote disclosure ships ay nasa upstream pa rin ng Q3 2026 deadline.
bridge.remaining_gap: Isang foundation-lab monthly revenue / WAU dashboard na maging public, plus ang Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token-margin 10-Q footnote separation.

prediction_ref.short_label: Powell stays on Board past May 15 reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology — by Q4 2026 FOMC reverts to ≤2 dissenters under Warsh; Powell-Warsh becomes marginal swing on Fed-investigation governance

validation_rows.evidence_summary: Apr 29 Powell carry-forward papasok sa Apr 30: Mananatili si Powell sa Board para sa "a period of time to be determined" pagkalipas ng May 15 Chair-term expiration; unang Fed Chair mula 1948 na gawin ito; tinanggihan ang "shadow chair" framing; ang Warsh nomination ay kinumpirma ng Senate Banking Apr 29 na may full-Senate vote na nakabinbin bago ang May 15. May 1 Apr jobs print sa 8:30 AM EDT; consensus 135K vs March 178K — unang weakening data papasok sa handoff window. April Mag 7 best month since 2020 ay bahagyang naka-price sa rate-cut hopes.

reference_links.label: PBS NewsHour - Powell says he will stay on Fed board after chair term ends
BLS - Schedule of Releases for the Employment Situation
TheStreet - Stock Market Today (Apr. 30, 2026)

bridge.narrative: Ang Apr 30 carry ng 1948-precedent Board-stay ni Powell plus ang Warsh full-Senate vote na nakaiskedyul bago ang May 15 plus ang May 1 Apr jobs print bilang unang weakening data papasok sa handoff window ay umiimpok eksakto sa institutional-volatility setup na pinanindigan ng prediction. Ang evidence ngayon ay nag-o-operate ng premise ng prediction sa halip na subukan ito.
bridge.remaining_gap: Ang unang Warsh-led FOMC press conference na nag-re-re-anchor ng dissent sa ≤2 plus isang financial-press structural-analysis piece na tumitingin sa 1992 precedent bilang steady-state reference point.

prediction_ref.short_label: "Headless Everything" architecture standardizes (browserless / API-only agent UI / GUI-driving agents)

validation_rows.evidence_summary: Ang Apr 30 weblog wave ni Simon Willison ay sumasaklaw sa "We need RSS for sharing abundant vibe-coded apps", Codex CLI 0.128.0 /goal addition, at ang anti-AI contribution policy ng Zig project — wala sa mga ito ang nagdi-discuss ng headless-architecture standardization. Layer 1 keyword hit sa source name na walang Layer 2 semantic match.

reference_links.label: Simon Willison's Weblog - Apr 30 entries

bridge.narrative: Ang tape ngayon ay nagprodyus ng mechanical keyword hit sa source attribution ng dormant entry, ngunit walang Layer 2 semantic match laban sa headless-preferred / API-only thesis. Ang periodic ping ng dormant pool ay hindi pa due, kaya ito ay pass-through holding pattern sa halip na revival.
bridge.remaining_gap: Isang MCP / Agent Registry release na naglalathala ng headless-preferred metadata field, o isang frontier-lab announcement na nagpapakita ng browserless-first agent UI bilang default.
